ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "nationality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the nationality of the participant */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the participant (Male/Female) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "handedness_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the handedness category of the participant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email address of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_nationality_id FOREIGN KEY ("nationality_id") REFERENCES nationalities ("nationality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_handedness_id FOREIGN KEY ("handedness_id") REFERENCES handedness_categories ("handedness_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nationalities" (
  "nationality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nationality */,
  "nationality_name" TEXT /* Name of the nationality */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code for the nationality */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent of the nationality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nationality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "handedness_categories" (
  "handedness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each handedness category */,
  "handedness_name" TEXT /* Name of the handedness category (Right/Left) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the handedness category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("handedness_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant the demographics belong to */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the participant */,
  "language_proficiency" TEXT /* Language proficiency of the participant */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the participant */,
  "annual_income" REAL /* Annual income of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_demographics_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role associated with the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the activity */,
  "activity_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report entry */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Binary data of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

Unique identifier for each handedness category
Unique identifier for each demographic entry
